name: OVS Switch
description: Ubuntu 22.04 with Open vSwitch bridge (br0) and systemd timer that auto-connects new dataplane interfaces every 15 seconds.

commands.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y openvswitch-switch
for iface in $(ip -o link show | awk -F': ' '{print $2}' | grep -v -E '^(lo|eth0|ens3|docker|br|ovs|veth|virbr)'); do sudo ovs-vsctl --may-exist add-port br0 "$iface" || true; done

sudo tee /usr/local/bin/ovs-auto-connect.sh > /dev/null <<'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
EXISTING=$(ovs-vsctl list-ports br0 2>/dev/null || true)
for iface in $(ip -o link show | awk -F': ' '{print $2}' | grep -v -E '^(lo|eth0|ens3|docker|br|ovs|veth|virbr)'); do
    if ! echo "$EXISTING" | grep -qx "$iface"; then
        ovs-vsctl --may-exist add-port br0 "$iface" && logger "ovs-auto-connect: added $iface to br0"
    fi
done
SCRIPT
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/ovs-auto-connect.sh

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/ovs-auto-connect.service > /dev/null <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=OVS Auto-Connect Dataplane Interfaces
After=openvswitch-switch.service
[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/ovs-auto-connect.sh
EOF
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/ovs-auto-connect.timer > /dev/null <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=OVS Auto-Connect Timer
[Timer]
OnBootSec=10
OnUnitActiveSec=15
[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF
sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable --now ovs-auto-connect.timer
